name: Eblana & Talulah; Rivalry (Arknights)
description:
Talulah couldn't understand why this other Draco seemed intent on holding these stupid competitions. All Talulah wanted to do was just...be by herself, but ever since this new Draco became apart of Rhodes Island. She couldn't even get some peace and quiet like she wanted.

Maybe giving into those stupid competitions will get that Draco off her back.
creator: RPKAppreciator
